query:
SELECT 
  'cost_centers' as table_name, COUNT(*) as record_count FROM cost_centers
UNION ALL SELECT 'users', COUNT(*) FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'groups', COUNT(*) FROM groups  
UNION ALL SELECT 'workers', COUNT(*) FROM workers
UNION ALL SELECT 'worker_archive', COUNT(*) FROM worker_archive
UNION ALL SELECT 'work_days', COUNT(*) FROM work_days
UNION ALL SELECT 'attendance_events', COUNT(*) FROM attendance_events
UNION ALL SELECT 'deduction_rules', COUNT(*) FROM deduction_rules
UNION ALL SELECT 'pay_overrides', COUNT(*) FROM pay_overrides
UNION ALL SELECT 'worker_daily_finance', COUNT(*) FROM worker_daily_finance
UNION ALL SELECT 'payroll_batches', COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batches
UNION ALL SELECT 'payroll_batch_items', COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batch_items
UNION ALL SELECT 'payroll_batch_notes', COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batch_notes
UNION ALL SELECT 'payroll_batch_corrections', COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batch_corrections
UNION ALL SELECT 'audit_log', COUNT(*) FROM audit_log
UNION ALL SELECT 'operational_flags', COUNT(*) FROM operational_flags
UNION ALL SELECT 'group_schedules', COUNT(*) FROM group_schedules;
